title: Game is dark | Lights are flickering | No Traction on Rain, Slipping, Sliding.

messages.content: # Is your game ridiculously dark? Are lights flickering? Are you getting absolutely no traction in the rain and are slipping and sliding everywhere? Follow this guide!

# Method 1
> Open Content Manager and go to Settings > Custom Shaders Patch > Colorful Shadowing and **uncheck** the “Active” box.
